name: sux
description: Single-plugin marketplace for the sux MCP server — one install adds the canonical `sux` skill AND registers the sux MCP connector.

plugins.name: sux-router
plugins.description: Installs the `sux` skill (intent→tool routing) AND the sux MCP connector (https://sux.colinxs.workers.dev/mcp) in one step — routing guidance plus the tools themselves (web search, scraping/rendering, papers, shopping, documents, transforms, pipe/batch composition). OAuth is completed in-browser via /mcp on first connect.
